passives.name: Fanfare
passives.effects: {{tip|Slow|Slowing}} or {{tip|immobilize|immobilizing}} an enemy champion empowers you with ''Fanfare'' for {{rd|8|4}} seconds, granting you {{as|20 '''bonus''' movement speed}}. While empowered, you and nearby allied champions also gain {{as|{{rd|30|20}}% '''bonus''' attack speed}}.

effects_structured.raw: Slow/immobilize enemy grants bonus MS and nearby allies bonus attack speed for 8s.
Nearby allies gain bonus attack speed while empowered.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Verified Fanfare trigger and melee/ranged split against page-level source: slow or immobilize enemy champion grants self movement speed and ally attack speed aura with shorter/lower ranged values.
